steps.title: Connect birds to seedlings
steps.content: The text first says Atacama Desert soil has a tough crust that makes germination hard. It then says local birds help by churning soil and exposing buried seeds to moisture and nutrients. The underlined portion explains the mechanism behind that help.

steps.title: Reject other functions
steps.content: Choice A focuses only on the crust, not the birds' helpful action. Choice B says the underlined portion explains seed deposition, but it describes exposing buried seeds. Choice C asks why birds dig nests, which the underlined portion does not address.

steps.title: State the bird mechanism
steps.content: The remaining choice correctly says the underlined portion explains how certain birds promote seed germination in the desert soil. The answer is D.
